channel.title: Sega on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in Sega on Tech Tracker

item.title: How to play Sega MD, CD, SMS, GG, SG1000, 32X games on Android.
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-sWJT00xBZKQ/Yyw4jLJ9eTI/AAAAAAAAOAM/IlXVq301WDs-bXnyaUpOPwWQYw13YplaACNcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1663842439831384-0.png" alt=""> The era of digital games begin when computers are integrated with operating systems basically softwares since year 1962 many companies and developers using several programming languages developed video games but back then computers are not in wide usage as they are big and expensive so only millionaires and big companies can afford them. Even though, by 1970s we got less expensive small and home compatible PCs aka personal computers with better hardware and advanced softwares which are capable to play thousands of amazing digital video games but at the end they are not designed for gaming you can do many more tasks electronically and digitally so not everyone like to buy them especially kids who just want to play video games.
